word: G1065 - γέ - gé - gheh - And besides

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: NA / Not Available
where what is least is indicated; indeed, truly, at least
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: A primary particle of emphasis or qualification (often used with other particles prefixed): - and besides, doubtless, at least, yet.
